nodes.label: Cardholder
nodes.notes: Consumer initiating payment via mobile app or digital wallet.

nodes.label: Mobile App
nodes.notes: Req 6: Secure mobile app development. Certificate pinning, no CHD in local storage.

nodes.label: WAF / CDN
nodes.notes: Req 6.4: WAF inspection for all internet-facing APIs. TLS termination at CDN edge.

nodes.label: API Gateway
nodes.notes: Req 6: API authentication (OAuth 2.0 / mTLS). Rate limiting. No PAN logged.

nodes.label: Payment Processor
nodes.notes: Req 4.2.1: Encrypt PAN across all open networks. TLS 1.2+ minimum.

nodes.label: Token Vault
nodes.notes: Network token (EMVCo) or PSP token replaces PAN. Significantly reduces scope.

nodes.label: Card Network
nodes.notes: External. Network tokenization service (NTS) may be operated by card brand.

nodes.label: Token Database
nodes.notes: Req 3.3: Stores network tokens only. PAN never written to disk by merchant.

nodes.label: Issuing Bank
nodes.notes: External — cardholder's bank. Performs authorisation decisioning.
